PrivacyMeta.title: Privacy policy | Alquiler Karaoke
PrivacyMeta.description: Information about the processing of your personal data: controller, purpose, legal basis and your rights (access, rectification, erasure).

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.draftNotice: Indicative draft pending legal review. Complete the company details in the admin panel.
Privacy.purposeText: We process your data to handle your request or enquiry, prepare quotes and manage the booking of our services. With your consent, also to send you commercial communications (offers, news and events).
Privacy.legalBasisText: Processing is based on your consent and, where applicable, on the performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures at your request.
Privacy.marketingText: We only send advertising if you ticked the marketing consent box. You can unsubscribe at any time via the link in each email or by contacting us.
Privacy.rightsText: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing and portability by writing to our contact email. You may also lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (AEPD).
Privacy.retentionText: We keep your data for as long as necessary for the stated purpose and, afterwards, for the applicable legal periods.

ServicesMeta.title: Karaoke, sound & event services | Alquiler Karaoke
ServicesMeta.description: Professional karaoke, DJ, sound, lighting, photo booth and events for individuals and companies across Spain. Get a quote.

ServicesPage.title: Karaoke & event services
ServicesPage.intro: Everything you need for your event, with professional gear and setup included. Pick a service or combine them into a tailored package.

faq.a: Yes. We cover the main cities and provinces; ask us about your area.
You can book it with or without a technician, depending on the service and package.
It depends on the service, date and location. Ask us for a no-obligation quote.

CityLandingMeta.title: Karaoke rental in {city} | Alquiler Karaoke
CityLandingMeta.description: Professional karaoke rental in {city} and its province ({region}): equipment, screens, sound and lighting with setup. Get a free quote.

CityLanding.title: Karaoke rental in {city}
CityLanding.intro: We bring professional karaoke to {city} and its whole province ({region}): equipment, thousands of songs, sound and lighting, with or without a technician. Perfect for parties, weddings, birthdays and company events.
CityLanding.faqQ1: Do you offer karaoke rental in {city}?
CityLanding.faqA1: Yes. We offer karaoke and event rental in {city}, {nearby1}, {nearby2} and the rest of the province of {province}, setup included.
CityLanding.faqQ2: Can you set up at my venue or home in {city}?
CityLanding.faqA2: Yes. We adapt to halls, venues and homes in {city}, {nearby1} and nearby areas; tell us about the space and we handle the rest.
CityLanding.faqQ3: How far in advance should I book?
CityLanding.faqA3: The sooner the better, especially on weekends and special dates. Write to us and we'll confirm availability in {city} and {nearby1}.
CityLanding.ctaText: Ask us for a quote for your event in {city}, no obligation.
CityLanding.coverageText: We operate in {city} and towns across the province of {province}, including:
CityLanding.introB: Looking for karaoke rental in {city}? We set up the full rig —screens, microphones, sound and lighting— across {city} and its province ({region}). With or without a technician, for private parties, weddings and company events.
CityLanding.introC: Professional karaoke at your home or venue in {city}. We bring the setup and thousands of songs so your guests just sing, across {city} and nearby towns ({region}).
CityLanding.populationNote: With around {population, number} inhabitants, {city} is an ideal setting for parties and events.

Unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe from marketing
Unsubscribe.intro: Enter the email you contacted us with and we will stop sending you marketing communications.

Unsubscribe.error: We couldn't process it. Check the email and try again.
Unsubscribe.note: This only affects marketing communications. We will still send the messages needed to handle your requests or bookings.

CitiesHub.ctaText: We cover many more towns. Tell us where your event is and we'll confirm.
